snapshot_root: workspace root E:/1-AI辅助工作/科研项目/强化学习
purpose: Keep the reviewable GitHub tree aligned with the local workspace layout without publishing large or disposable training artifacts.
public_snapshot_subtrees: gym-pybullet-drones/<tracked source, documentation, configuration, and small evidence files>
research_papers/<tracked paper text and small reference files>
reviewable_result_content: README.md files describing each protocol/stage and its local-only artifacts
small JSON/CSV manifests, summaries, gate decisions, and run metadata
configuration and reproducibility evidence needed to audit the experiment
local_cache_note: The local workspace contains approximately 15.7 GiB of hidden-disturbance replay buffers and other generated training artifacts, plus disposable worktrees. They remain local and are not deleted or uploaded.
layout_rule: A directory is represented on GitHub by its reviewable files or a README.md placeholder; no fake checkpoint, replay, or archive files are created.
update_rule: Add compact evidence and update the relevant README when a run is complete. Keep raw buffers, model checkpoints, caches, videos, and temporary logs local.
